title: Gray Tusken
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
{{Conjecture|noncanon}}
The '''Gray Tusken''' was a member of the [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tuskens]], a para-military force in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He was one of a [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] sent down to the surface of [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]] by one of the [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officers]] aboard the captured [[Tantive IV/Legends|rebel ship]] in orbit, in an effort to find out what [[Deacon|Deak Starkiller]] was doing in the system.

This Tusken was a big, muscular man, with sunken, red eyes. His face was dusty.

When the "Gray Tusken" arrived at [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]], he found a [[Mechanic (Anchorhead)|Mechanic]] who had already given [[R2-D2/Legends|Artoo]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|Threepio]] directions to the [[Lars homestead/Legends|Lars homestead]]. The Tusken eventually followed [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Starkiller]] and the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] into [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]].

==Behind the scenes==
The "Tuskens" became a native population on Utapau (later [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]) in the later [[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars|third draft]], and were no longer Imperial agents. That role was taken up later by the [[Desert Sands]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and by [[Garindan/Legends|Garindan]] in the fourth draft (shooting script).
